slides.welcome_desc: You deserve a study tool that actually gets you. No clutter, no confusion — just the smartest way to learn, built around you.
slides.study_sets_desc: Spend less time making notes and more time actually learning. AI turns your documents into ready-to-use study materials in seconds.
slides.study_sets_bullet1: Go from PDF to flashcards in seconds — AI does the heavy lifting
slides.study_sets_bullet2: Choose how you learn best — standard, cloze, or image occlusion
slides.study_sets_bullet3: Share with classmates and help each other succeed
slides.ai_chat_desc: No more waiting for office hours or feeling embarrassed to ask. Get clear, patient explanations whenever you need them.
slides.ai_chat_bullet1: Ask anything about your materials and get instant clarity
slides.ai_chat_bullet2: Explanations match your level — you'll actually understand
slides.ai_chat_bullet3: Picks up where you left off, so learning feels natural
slides.problem_solver_title: Get Unstuck on Any Problem, Instantly
slides.problem_solver_desc: That frustrating moment when you're stuck at 2 AM? Gone. Snap a photo or type it in, and finally understand how to solve it.
slides.problem_solver_bullet1: Snap a photo or type any problem — math, science, anything
slides.problem_solver_bullet2: Understand the 'how' and 'why', not just the final answer
slides.problem_solver_bullet3: Build real problem-solving skills you can use on exam day
slides.exam_clone_title: Walk Into Every Exam With Confidence
slides.exam_clone_desc: The best way to beat exam anxiety? Practice until it feels easy. Upload a past paper and get unlimited questions that match the real thing.
slides.exam_clone_bullet1: AI learns your exam's format, style, and difficulty level
slides.exam_clone_bullet2: Practice as many times as you need until you feel ready
slides.exam_clone_bullet3: Set your exam date and get a countdown with a personalized plan
slides.live_quiz_desc: Learning doesn't have to be lonely. Turn study sessions into friendly competitions and motivate each other to keep going.
slides.live_quiz_bullet1: Invite friends with a simple code — start in seconds
slides.live_quiz_bullet2: Compete on live leaderboards and celebrate each other's wins
slides.live_quiz_bullet3: Questions from your own study sets — fun and actually useful
slides.spaced_rep_desc: Ever studied hard for a test, only to forget everything a week later? Our smart system makes sure that never happens again.
slides.spaced_rep_bullet1: Tough concepts come back more often until they finally click
slides.spaced_rep_bullet2: Already mastered it? You won't waste time reviewing it again
slides.spaced_rep_bullet3: Watch your retention grow stronger every single day
slides.analytics_desc: Nothing keeps you going like seeing real progress. Track every study session, celebrate milestones, and know exactly where you stand.
slides.analytics_bullet1: Beautiful heatmaps show your dedication over weeks and months
slides.analytics_bullet2: Earn XP, level up, and build streaks that keep you motivated
slides.analytics_bullet3: Spot weak areas early so you can fix them before exams
slides.handwriting_title: Your Notes Deserve to Be Digital
slides.handwriting_desc: All those handwritten notes you've been collecting? One photo turns them into searchable, editable text you can study from anywhere.
slides.handwriting_bullet1: Snap a photo of any notebook page or whiteboard
slides.handwriting_bullet2: Even messy handwriting gets read accurately by AI vision
slides.handwriting_bullet3: Instantly turn scanned notes into flashcards — like magic
slides.ad_free_desc: We believe studying should be sacred. No ads will ever interrupt your focus. No data sold. Just a pure, honest tool made with love for students.
slides.ad_free_bullet1: Zero ads, zero pop-ups, zero sponsored content — forever
slides.ad_free_bullet2: Your data stays yours — we never sell it to anyone
slides.ad_free_bullet3: A calm, clean space designed for deep focus and real learning

slide_1.title: Welcome to Studyield
slide_1.subtitle: Your AI-Powered Study Companion
slide_1.description: You deserve a study tool that actually gets you. No clutter, no confusion — just the smartest way to learn, built around you.

slide_2.title: Learn Faster with AI-Built Materials
slide_2.subtitle: Smart Flashcards & Study Sets
slide_2.description: Spend less time making notes and more time actually learning. AI turns your documents into ready-to-use study materials in seconds.

slide_3.title: Get Unstuck on Any Problem, Instantly
slide_3.subtitle: AI Problem Solver
slide_3.description: Snap a photo or type it in, and finally understand how to solve it.

slide_4.title: Stay Motivated, Level Up
slide_4.subtitle: XP, Streaks & Achievements
slide_4.description: Nothing keeps you going like seeing real progress. Earn XP, build streaks, and level up as you learn.

slide_5.title: Your Personalized Learning Path
slide_5.subtitle: Smart Study Plans
slide_5.description: Get a customized study plan that adapts to your goals and progress.

benefits.benefit_1: AI creates a plan tailored to your exam dates and goals
benefits.benefit_2: Track your progress and stay on schedule
benefits.benefit_3: Adaptive learning that focuses on what you need most
